name: North Wood Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 6 medium Potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
6 cups Chicken stock (You can use canned chicken broth.)
2 6 oz cans Minced clams, drained - save liquid
1 pkg. fresh mushrooms, sliced into three pieces lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt to taste.
2. Heat sherry to Golden.
3. Saute onions and mushrooms in butter until onions are clear.
4. Add potatoes, broth, clam liquid, and lemon juice to a 6 qt. soup pot.
5. Boil for 20 minutes.
6. Stir flour into onions and mushrooms until smooth.
7. Add onion mixture to the soup pot.
8. Toss in bay leaves and pepper, add salt to taste, cook for 10 minutes, stirring often.
9. Add clams, cream, and wild rice.
10. Heat, stirring constantly, just before serving.
